title: Who is Elfilea VTuber? Her streaming journey explored as she speaks out in Sykkuno controversy
summary_full: Elfilea is an indie VTuber who recently became part of a controversy involving Thomas Sykkuno after claims shared by Mal Hemomal. Known for her casual streams and cosplay background, she said she felt hurt after years of trust. Following backlash and online threats, she limited her activity and is currently on a break.
